item.title: MACK ULTRALINER v4.0 1.59-1.60.x ATS
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 2, 2026

MACK ULTRALINER v4.0 1.59-1.60.x ATS

The Mack Ultraliner is one of the most recognizable cabover trucks in American trucking history. Its rugged design, flat-front cab, and distinctive appearance made it a familiar sight on highways and freight fleets throughout the 1980s and 1990s. This mod brings that same character to American Truck Simulator, faithfully recreating one of Mack’s most iconic models.

The mod features a carefully crafted exterior and interior, delivering a classic cabover driving experience for players who appreciate vintage trucks. Every detail has been designed to capture the look and feel of the original Ultraliner while preserving its unique identity within ATS.

Main Features
Detailed Mack Ultraliner cab.
Functional interior faithful to the original design.
Two chassis configurations.
Various engine and transmission options.
Extensive customization possibilities.
Predefined & custom paints and accessories.
Vehicle-specific sounds.
Compatible with current versions of American Truck Simulator.

Credits: Cyrus, Elaman, Gazila, Fenix, Mahad110, Luis Esqueda, Kriechbaum.

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 2, 2026

MACK ULTRALINER v4.0 1.59-1.60.x ATS

The Mack Ultraliner is one of the most recognizable cabover trucks in American trucking history. Its rugged design, flat-front cab, and distinctive appearance made it a familiar sight on highways and freight fleets throughout the 1980s and 1990s. This mod brings that same character to American Truck Simulator, faithfully recreating one of Mack’s most iconic models.

The mod features a carefully crafted exterior and interior, delivering a classic cabover driving experience for players who appreciate vintage trucks. Every detail has been designed to capture the look and feel of the original Ultraliner while preserving its unique identity within ATS.

Main Features
Detailed Mack Ultraliner cab.
Functional interior faithful to the original design.
Two chassis configurations.
Various engine and transmission options.
Extensive customization possibilities.
Predefined & custom paints and accessories.
Vehicle-specific sounds.
Compatible with current versions of American Truck Simulator.

Credits: Cyrus, Elaman, Gazila, Fenix, Mahad110, Luis Esqueda, Kriechbaum.

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Volkswagen Titan (2000 – 2005) v1.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 2, 2026

Volkswagen Titan (2000 – 2005) v1.0 ETS2

Mod for the latest version of Euro Truck Simulator 2.

The mod will have updates (where possible)*.

The mod contains:
– Original factory cab (Single) and two sleeper cabs (High and Low).
– Original factory engines (Cummins 6CTAA and Cummins 6CTAA Turbo Intercooler).
– Original factory transmission (ZF 16S-1650).
– 4×2 and 6×2 chassis.
– Original interior.

The mod was designed to be as faithful as possible to the real truck.

Credits: RBZ Mods

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 2, 2026

Volkswagen Titan (2000 – 2005) v1.0 ETS2

Mod for the latest version of Euro Truck Simulator 2.

The mod will have updates (where possible)*.

The mod contains:
– Original factory cab (Single) and two sleeper cabs (High and Low).
– Original factory engines (Cummins 6CTAA and Cummins 6CTAA Turbo Intercooler).
– Original factory transmission (ZF 16S-1650).
– 4×2 and 6×2 chassis.
– Original interior.

The mod was designed to be as faithful as possible to the real truck.

Credits: RBZ Mods

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Scania P310 Bitruck v1.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 2, 2026

Scania P310 Bitruck v1.0 ETS2

1 Cabin
2 Chassins 4X2/6X4
1 Engine
1 Trasmission
1 Interior
DLC Cabin Acessories

Credits: Wanderley-Simulador

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

item.title: Waze Croatian Voices for Radar Detector v1.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 2, 2026

Waze Croatian Voices for Radar Detector v1.0 ETS2

Waze Croatian Voices for Radar Detector v2.1.9

This is an audio addon for Euro Truck Simulator 2 that replaces the default alert sounds of the Radar-Detector mod with authentic Croatian voice lines and alerts from the Waze navigation app.

Important Requirement:
This mod is a dependent addon. The base mod RADAR-DETECTOR v2.1.9 must be downloaded and active in your mod manager for this addon to function correctly.
You can get the required base mod here: RADAR-DETECTOR v2.1.9

Features:
Croatian audio alerts sourced from Waze.
Sound modifications for speed cameras, police traps, and hazardous road alerts.

Recommended Load Order Priority:
To ensure proper functionality, place the files in your Mod Manager in the following order:
1. Waze Croatian Voices for Radar Detector (This Addon)
2. RADAR-DETECTOR v2.1.9 (Base Mod)

Credits: ii_shark

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 2, 2026

Waze Croatian Voices for Radar Detector v1.0 ETS2

Waze Croatian Voices for Radar Detector v2.1.9

This is an audio addon for Euro Truck Simulator 2 that replaces the default alert sounds of the Radar-Detector mod with authentic Croatian voice lines and alerts from the Waze navigation app.

Important Requirement:
This mod is a dependent addon. The base mod RADAR-DETECTOR v2.1.9 must be downloaded and active in your mod manager for this addon to function correctly.
You can get the required base mod here: RADAR-DETECTOR v2.1.9

Features:
Croatian audio alerts sourced from Waze.
Sound modifications for speed cameras, police traps, and hazardous road alerts.

Recommended Load Order Priority:
To ensure proper functionality, place the files in your Mod Manager in the following order:
1. Waze Croatian Voices for Radar Detector (This Addon)
2. RADAR-DETECTOR v2.1.9 (Base Mod)

Credits: ii_shark

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Indian Mega Pack v0.4 (Early Access) by Crimvex Studio ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 2, 2026

Indian Mega Pack v0.4 (Early Access) by Crimvex Studio ETS2

Bring authentic Indian vibes to your Euro Truck Simulator 2 interiors with the Indian Mega Pack.
This project is in early development and is released to gather community feedback while the pack continues to grow with regular updates.

Development Status
EARLY ACCESS / WORK IN PROGRESS
The pack is actively under development
Updated frequently with new content and improvements
Community feedback plays an important role in shaping future updates

Indian Mega Pack v0.4 – Changelog

New Dashboard Accessories Added
– Added Mylara Swamy Photo
– Added Mylara Swamy Photo 2
– Added Hanumanji Photo
– Added Manjunatha Swamy Photo
– Added Hanumanji Photo 2

Continued expansion of the interior accessory collection

Current Content
Indian-themed interior accessories
Dashboard decorative items
Performance friendly and optimized textures

Planned Content (Future Updates)
More Indian interior props
Hanging items and dashboard accessories
Support for additional trucks
Visual improvements and variations
Continuous quality and content updates

Important Notes
This is an interior decoration pack, not a truck mod
Expect frequent updates and changes during development

Credits: Abhishek Gaikwad (Crimvex Studio)

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
